title: あなたがいてくれたから

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
My, this crepe is so fluffy and scrumptious!
Though I'd expect no less from a restaurant you
recommended!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad that you like it. Next, I thought we could
go to the aquarium to see the dolphin show...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Mother! Where are you going?! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Where could she be? I'm certain that I saw her
enter this park, but...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wow! This is amazing! You were right—I didn't fall
when I tried your suggestion! Auntie, I want to run
even faster!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Then you'll have to race against others who are
fast! But for today, I suppose I can be your
opponent...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Mother! If she needs an opponent to race
against, I'd be happy to help!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! The sun's already gone bye-bye! I hafta say
bye-bye too! Thank you, Auntie and Miss!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, yes, it's already evening now... Wait, it's
already evening?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, I've made a mess of things again, haven't I?
I'm sorry, Air Groove! The aquarium is surely
closed by now...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to apologize, Mother. Let's just
skip over that and move on to the next part of
our itinerary.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this night view is exquisite! How stunning! I
can't believe you knew about a place like this.
You're really not to be underestimated!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I know how you enjoy high places, Mother.
...I'm glad to see you back in good spirits.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh! Well, you know, it's just...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Is something the matter? Have I done something
to disappoint you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
No, no, nothing of the sort! I was just thinking
about how reliable you are, my dear daughter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You've always helped me ever since you were
young. Remember how you used to look after
your two younger sisters when I was busy?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You were always so dependable. But, well,
perhaps my behavior forced you to be that way.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I wonder how you would have turned out
if you had been born to a different mother.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Mother, you...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Goodness! Why are you looking at me with
such a frightening expression? That was a joke! A
hypothetical what-if!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Please never say anything like that ever again!
Even as a "joke"!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Mother... Do you remember?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You would always take me places to experience
new things. And not just racecourses—festivals
and events, too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I'm able to be flexible in my
approach while handling the different matters
that are brought to the student council.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And I never give up, no matter what unfavorable
situation I find myself in. I give everything I have
in the belief that I can win.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can maintain that pride in myself because the
image of you striving for victory is always at the
back of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If even one fragment of all I've inherited and
learned from you was missing from me, I wouldn't
be who I am today.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I am your daughter. And that will never change.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Um...
...I apologize for raising my voice at you like that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
...No, I'm the one who should apologize. Joke or
not, I shouldn't have said that. And besides...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: I'm glad... I'm really glad that you're my daughter.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Since the moment you were born, you've taught
me so much, too... You're the one who puts a
smile on my face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home after finishing work, I spot Air
Groove in rather high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: She's glad I'm her daughter...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... What elation I feel... The moon looks
awfully beautiful tonight.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... What elation I feel... The moon looks
awfully beautiful tonight.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... It's you. Tell me, do you express
gratitude to those most important to you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If not, then you should strive to be more
cognizant of those feelings. It's easy to forget
that those closest to you are your biggest
supporters.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you. Yes, it is a rather pleasant night.
Almost a shame that it has to end. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she gazes up at the night sky, Air Groove's
eyes are brimming with kindness.
